mission.title: grpc: "Segmentation fault" on alpine linux
mission.description: "Segmentation fault" on alpine linux. This issue affects 11+ users.

steps.title: Identify grpc troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your grpc setup:
gRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)
Check your build output and test logs for errors related to this issue.

steps.title: Review grpc configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant grpc configuration:
### What version of gRPC and what language are you using?
`grpc-1.41.0-x86_64-linux` on ruby 3.0.2

### What operating system (Linux, Windows,...) and version?
Alpine Linux 3.14 (ruby `3.0.2-alpine3.14` docker image)

### What runtime / compiler are

steps.title: Apply the fix for "Segmentation fault" on alpine linux
steps.description:
Looking at objdump, this looks to be similar to grpc/grpc-java#8751. It appears __strdup isn't available and the linker doesn't produce a clean error.

```
000000000005e6e0 <__strdup>:
   5e6e0:	ff 25 8a cc 59 00    	jmp    *0x59cc8a(%rip)        # 5fb370 <__strdup.2.5>
   5e6e6:	68 6b 00 00 00    
```yaml
/usr/local/bundle/gems/grpc-1.41.0-x86_64-linux/src/ruby/lib/grpc/generic/active_call.rb:367: [BUG] Segmentation fault at 0x000000000005e6e6
 ruby 3.0.2p107 (2021-07-07 revision 0db68f0233) [x86_64-linux-musl]
 
 -- Control frame information -----------------------------------------------
 c:0034 p:---- s:0211 e:000210 CFUNC  :run_batch
 c:0033 p:0088 s:0206 e:000205 METHOD /usr/local/bundle/gems/grpc-1.41.0-x86_64-linux/src/ruby/lib/grpc/generic/active_call.rb:367
 c:0032 p:0012 s:0197 e:000196 BLOCK  /usr/local/bundle/gems/grpc-1.41.0-x86_64-linux/src/ruby/lib/grpc/generic/client_stub.rb:174
```

steps.title: Confirm "Segmentation fault" on alpine linux is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.
